SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Aug-19-2009 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: 9:50am
Judge Pro Tem Deborah Daniloff, clerk-Beth Wilber, nothing on record, Dept. 525:
Cause called for Small Claims Appeal. Parties are sworn. Appellant, Bruce Winchell Associates, appears in Pro Per through Bruce Winchell; Respondents Christian Ard and Rebecca Mosher, appear in Pro Per. The Court determines that the Appeal was filed untimely. The case will be dismissed. No new evidence was introduced. Defendant's exhibits from the previous hearing, remain in the file.
